Thanks for contributing! Please review [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) and [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) before submitting.

## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Changes

- [ ] Change 1
- [ ] Change 2

## Testing

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make format-check` passes
- [ ] `make test-cov` passes (>= 90% coverage)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered

## Documentation & Release

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if public APIs or behavior changed)
- [ ] No temporary files or debug code left in the repository

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
